items.badge_description: There's beer in them thar hills! You're setting off on your journey through the world of beer, but be sure to take a little time to get to know each brewery as you go. That's a beer from 85 different breweries. Try 5 more for Level 18!
Do you come from the land down under, where beer does flow, and men chunder? That's at least 290 different beers from Australia. Try 5 more for Level 59!

items.checkin_comment: Best beer of the day, not crazy abv and my favourite stout style.

user.bio: Pub regular and real ale drinker

items.badge_name: Beyond a Shadow of a Stout (Level 26)
items.badge_description: We all love Stouts, and now we have a dedicated badge to celebrate your dedication to these dark, top-fermented beer in multiple variations, like Oatmeal, Milk and more! Which one will you start with? That's 130 different beers with the style of Stout. Try 5 more for Level 27!
Your quest to quench your thirst leaves no stone unturned! That's at least 150 distinct venues!

items.checkin_comment: A little in the thin side, but flavoursome. Hint of cola?

items.badge_description: Porters and Stouts are rich with both history and flavor. Roasty, dark, and delicious, these two styles helped start it all. That’s 410 different beers with the style of Porter or Stout. Try 5 more for Level 83!

items.checkin_comment: The phot indicates a wee stout
Drinks like an ESB way more than a stout.

items.badge_description: Want to enjoy a day of brews, but need to keep your wits sharp? There are plenty of delicious brews under 5% for you to sip on throughout the day. That's 310 different beers with an ABV of 5% and lower.
